text: Define the fundable prototype: an open Git-native intent and dependency protocol
description: Specify the new six-month project independently from the existing app. Candidate deliverables: versioned open schema for aims/dependencies/rationale/provenance; Git-native CLI and validation tooling; aim-to-commit evidence; interoperable import/export; reference integration in Aimparency; documentation and examples for other open-source projects. Explain why this is reusable software infrastructure, how it improves user sovereignty around AI agents, and what technical uncertainty makes it a prototype rather than routine product work.

status.comment: Core application decision; draft and validate before writing the full application.
